get_merge_request.title: Add idempotency keys to the refund endpoint
get_merge_request.description:
## What & why

Adds idempotency-key support to `POST /refunds` so a retried request never issues a
duplicate refund. Resolves the duplicate-refund incidents seen during gateway timeouts.

Jira: https://acme.atlassian.net/browse/PAY-204

## How to test

1. `npm install && npm run dev`
2. `POST /refunds` twice with the same `Idempotency-Key` header.
3. Confirm the second call returns the first result and issues no second refund.
4. Run `npm test -- refunds` to exercise the unit tests.

## Proof it was run

Log of the two requests showing the second short-circuits, plus the passing test run:

```
POST /refunds key=abc123 -> 201 created refund re_1
POST /refunds key=abc123 -> 200 replayed refund re_1 (no new refund)
PASS  src/refunds/idempotency.test.ts (9 tests)
Test Suites: 1 passed, Tests: 9 passed
```

## Notes for reviewer

Start in `src/refunds/idempotency.ts` (key storage + lookup); the handler change in
`refunds.controller.ts` is thin. No breaking changes, no migrations.
get_merge_request.commit_summary: 3 commits: add idempotency store, wire controller, add tests

notes.body: Clear write-up and the replay log makes the behavior obvious — thanks.
